scripts.build: npm run build -w @hw5/shared && npm run build -w @hw5/api-gateway && npm run build -w @hw5/identity-service && npm run build -w @hw5/catalog-service && npm run build -w @hw5/reservation-service && npm run build -w @hw5/review-service
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @hw5/shared && concurrently -n shared,gateway,identity,catalog,reservation,review -c white,blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w @hw5/shared" "npm run dev -w @hw5/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @hw5/identity-service" "npm run dev -w @hw5/catalog-service" "npm run dev -w @hw5/reservation-service" "npm run dev -w @hw5/review-service"
